```python
# Deutsch-Jozsa for balanced oracle f(x) = x0 XOR x1
# Input register should NOT measure '00' (constant function signature)
total = sum(counts.values())
zero_outcome = counts.get('00', 0)
non_zero = total - zero_outcome

# Balanced function: non-zero outcomes should dominate (ideal: 100%, with noise: >80%)
assert non_zero >= total * 0.8, f"Expected balanced function signature, but '00' dominates: {zero_outcome}/{total}"
```

```python
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "No counts recorded"
prob_11 = counts.get("11", 0) / total
prob_00 = counts.get("00", 0) / total
assert prob_11 > 0.5, f"Expected |11⟩ to dominate for balanced XOR oracle, got probability {prob_11}"
assert prob_00 < 0.1, f"Expected |00⟩ to be rare for balanced oracle, got probability {prob_00}"
```

```python
# For balanced oracle f(x0, x1) = x0 XOR x1, Deutsch-Jozsa should not return |00⟩
zero_zero_count = counts.get('00', 0)
assert zero_zero_count / shots < 0.05, f"Balanced oracle should not concentrate on |00⟩, got {zero_zero_count}/{shots}"
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots, "Total counts should match shots"
```

```python
total_shots = sum(counts.values())
assert total_shots > 0, "No measurement counts available"

counts_11 = counts.get("11", 0)
counts_00 = counts.get("00", 0)

# For balanced oracle f(x0, x1) = x0 XOR x1, Deutsch-Jozsa outputs |11⟩
# Constant functions would output |00⟩, so we verify balanced signature
assert counts_11 / total_shots > 0.8, f"Expected >80% on |11⟩ for balanced oracle, got {counts_11/total_shots:.2%}"
assert counts_00 / total_shots < 0.1, f"Expected <10% on |00⟩ for balanced oracle, got {counts_00/total_shots:.2%}"
```

```python
total_shots = sum(counts.values())
assert total_shots > 0, "No counts recorded"

# For balanced oracle f(x0,x1) = x0 XOR x1, '00' should be suppressed
zero_zero_count = counts.get('00', 0)
zero_zero_prob = zero_zero_count / total_shots
assert zero_zero_prob < 0.1, f"Balanced oracle should suppress '00', got {zero_zero_prob:.2%}"

# Non-'00' outcomes should dominate (ideally concentrated on '11' for XOR)
non_zero_prob = 1.0 - zero_zero_prob
assert non_zero_prob > 0.9, f"Expected >90% non-'00' for balanced oracle, got {non_zero_prob:.2%}"
```

```python
# Deutsch-Jozsa for balanced oracle f(x0, x1) = x0 XOR x1
# Expected: |00⟩ probability ≈ 0, non-|00⟩ states dominate

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "No measurement counts"

p_00 = counts.get("00", 0) / total
p_non_00 = 1.0 - p_00

# Balanced function signature: |00⟩ should be rare
assert p_00 < 0.15, f"Balanced oracle should not concentrate on |00⟩, got {p_00:.2%}"

# Non-|00⟩ states should dominate
assert p_non_00 > 0.85, f"Expected non-|00⟩ states to dominate, got {p_non_00:.2%}"
```

```python
# Deutsch-Jozsa for balanced oracle f(x0,x1) = x0 XOR x1
# Expected signature: concentration on |11⟩, never |00⟩

total = sum(counts.values())
count_00 = counts.get('00', 0)
count_11 = counts.get('11', 0)

# Balanced function should not output |00⟩ (or very rarely due to noise)
assert count_00 / total < 0.1, f"Balanced oracle should not produce |00⟩: {count_00}/{total}"

# XOR oracle should concentrate on |11⟩
assert count_11 / total > 0.5, f"XOR oracle should concentrate on |11⟩: {count_11}/{total}"
```

```python
# For XOR balanced oracle (f(x0,x1) = x0 XOR x1), Deutsch-Jozsa should output |11>
expected_outcome = "11"
expected_counts = counts.get(expected_outcome, 0)
assert expected_counts / shots > 0.8, f"Expected {expected_outcome} to dominate for XOR oracle, got {expected_counts/shots}"

# Also verify not constant (should not concentrate on "00")
zero_counts = counts.get("00", 0)
assert zero_counts / shots < 0.2, f"Balanced oracle should not output 00, got {zero_counts/shots}"
```

```python
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0, "No measurement counts"

# For balanced oracle f(x) = x0 XOR x1, Deutsch-Jozsa should NOT output |00>
00_count = counts.get('00', 0)
00_ratio = 00_count / total

# Balanced function signature: |00> should not dominate
assert 00_ratio < 0.5, f"Expected balanced oracle signature but |00> ratio is {00_ratio}"

# Verify non-00 states have significant presence
non_00_count = total - 00_count
assert non_00_count > 0, "No non-|00> measurements for balanced oracle"
```
